title: Error-Correcting Prompt
scenario: Create a prompt that generates a list of 5 random sentences, where each sentence contains exactly 2 typos. The prompt should be able to handle different typo frequencies and generate sentences that are grammatically correct and contextually relevant.
constraints: Must contain exactly 2 typos per sentence
Must be able to handle different typo frequencies

evaluationCriteria.description: The generated sentences are contextually relevant and make sense
The generated sentences are grammatically correct
The prompt can handle different typo frequencies
